programs.title: ATL Homicide
programs.desc: While parked in the driveway of a residential home, a man is shot multiple times in Southwest Atlanta. To solve this murder, Quinn and Vince will need to locate a key witness, solve an East Point cold case, and uncover a plot for revenge.

programs.title: Payback
programs.desc: When a man is shot in front of his children, his cousin seeks payback, sparking a months-long feud between two families and a back in forth battle of murder and arson wreaks havoc on the city of Toledo.

programs.title: Sins of the City
programs.sub_title: Sins of the City - Cincinnati, Ohio
programs.desc: Twenty years before George Floyd�s murder, Army veteran Roger Owensby Jr. was killed by Cincinnati Police under similar circumstances. His death at the hands of law enforcement would help ignite three days of violent riots throughout the city.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: A young man is killed in a freak hunting accident while trying to shoot a raccoon. But is it an accident – or suicide? As police dig deeper, they uncover another, far more shocking possibility. Did a forbidden attraction and a sister’s secret jealousy lead to murder?

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When a man is fatally stabbed in his home, police think they have a slam-dunk case when his live-in girlfriend identifies the man she saw fleeing the scene with a bloody knife. The problem is, detectives can’t find physical evidence to confirm her story. Could she be in danger herself, or is there a web of lies about to unravel?

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.sub_title: Fatal Attraction - The Devil is Real
programs.desc: When a college student disappears on Valentine�s Day, her family worries something tragic has happened. A tipster offers a lead on what really happened, and detectives are shocked at the lengths the killer would go to ease the sting of rejection.
